;<span id="Cloze_deletion">cloze deletion</span> (cloze question; cloze item)
:[[Glossary:Item|item]] in the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cloze_test fill-in-the-blanks form]. In '''cloze deletions''', the question is replaced by three dots (<span class="cloze">[...]</span>) and moved to the answer field. For example: 
:<blockquote>''Q: The highest literacy rate in Africa has been reached in <span class="cloze">[...](country)</span>(2009)?''<br>''A: Seychelles (93%)''</blockquote> 
:'''Cloze items''' can effectively remedy knowledge complexity. If you have [[Glossary:Item|items]] that persistently cause recall problems, try using '''cloze deletion'''. SuperMemo simplifies creating '''cloze deletions''' by providing options such as:
:* ''Alt+Z'' keyboard shortcut,
:* '''Cloze''' on the [[learnbar]],
:* '''[[Component menu#Reading|Reading]] : Remember cloze''' on the [[component menu]], or
:* '''Remember cloze''' on the [[Read toolbar|'''Read''' toolbar]]
:Read more: [[Incremental reading]]
